description_long: This motorcycle features a modern, minimalist design with a matte gray and black color scheme. The frame is exposed, revealing a trellis structure and a compact engine, while the fuel tank is sculpted and slightly angular, bearing a subtle logo on the side. The seat is a single, elongated cushion with a slight rise at the rear, suitable for one or two riders. The front end is equipped with a round headlight, inverted forks, and a digital instrument cluster, while the rear showcases a short fender and a visible chain drive. Both wheels are alloy with disc brakes, and the exhaust is compact and positioned low on the right side. The overall build suggests a lightweight, agile motorcycle designed for urban commuting and spirited riding.
description: A sleek, matte gray and black motorcycle with exposed trellis frame, round headlight, and minimalist styling. It features alloy wheels, disc brakes, and a compact, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round headlight, inverted forks, and narrow profile of the handlebars and front wheel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the exposed trellis frame, sculpted fuel tank, and the full length of the seat and wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the short rear fender, taillight, license plate area, and the seat's tapering shape.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the engine, exhaust system, and the overall streamlined silhouette of the motorcycle.
